name: OpenBrain Agent Memory
description: Typed OpenClaw tools for OB1 Agent Memory recall, write-back, review, inspection, and traces.

endpoint.description: Base URL for the OB1 Agent Memory API, without a trailing slash.

accessKey.description: Optional direct OB1 access key. Prefer accessKeyEnv for shared configs.

accessKeyEnv.description: Environment variable containing the OB1 access key.

requireReviewByDefault.description: Keep agent-written memory pending review by default.

includeUnconfirmedRecall.description: Allow unconfirmed memories in recall responses.
